summary: P1 lock inputs are review-approved, and narrow Python SPEC_LOCK creation tooling is present. Canonical SPEC_LOCK has not yet been written to an authorized path.

resolved_gaps.verified_behavior: Dry-run and temporary output both create a schema-valid lock object after recomputing subject hashes, validating review decisions, and validating schema.

remaining_followups.expected_behavior: Own promotion state transitions from approved Candidate to locked state.
Mirror or import canonical lock schema for implementation-side validation, or explicitly declare control/schemas/spec_lock.schema.json as the only schema authority.

forbidden_shortcuts: Hand-writing a canonical SPEC_LOCK JSON file.
Renaming P1_SPEC_LOCK_CANDIDATE.json into a canonical lock.
Treating phase approval as implementation authorization.
Skipping recomputation of generated-output subject hashes.
recommended_resolution: Review tooling/create_spec_lock.py, then explicitly authorize running it to write P1-SPEC-LOCK-001 to the chosen canonical lock path.
